package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for background_worker_started_from_http_handler_registration: Route or middleware setup that also starts unrelated background jobs.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule008NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule008NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule008NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario008Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule008NegativeService, input Rule008NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
